name_cn:
Ophidia Backpack
▫️Model 836855 Medium
▫️Dimensions 28*30*18
Gucci's new Ophidia series presents a fresh silhouette and functionality, masterfully interpreting the iconic beige and brown color palette to create a soft-textured new bag.
